Riverbend Demo Credit Union lists the Riverbend Grocery Statement Credit Card.
New personal cardholders can receive a $150 statement credit after spending $750 at grocery stores in the first 60 days.
There is no annual fee and no visible card network is stated on this page.
The offer is public and expires November 30, 2026.
Statement credit appears on the billing statement within 6 to 8 weeks after qualifying grocery purchases post.
